source.section: Part 12 - Datalink & IFF > IFF from AZ/EL Page > Manual IFF (AZ/EL)

steps.action: Power Up IFF (Identify-Friend-or-Foe) and Datalink systems as shown previously in the MANUAL IFF – NCTR example.
steps.voiced: Power up IFF and Datalink as shown in the Manual IFF NCTR procedure.

steps.action: Make sure your Radar Power switch is set to OPR and Master Mode is set to A/A.
steps.voiced: Confirm Radar Power switch is set to OPR and Master Mode is A/A.

steps.action: Set Sensor Control Switch to the AZ/EL DDI (Sensor Control Switch Left since we showed up the AZ/EL page on the left DDI). A diamond will appear to show the left DDI is selected.
steps.voiced: Set Sensor Control Switch toward the AZ/EL DDI — confirm diamond appears.

steps.action: Set AZ/EL Sub-page to IFF RDR.
steps.voiced: Set the AZ/EL Sub-page to IFF RDR.

steps.action: Press the OSB next to L&S INT (Launch & Steering Interrogation) activate (boxed).
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to L&S INT to activate — confirm it boxes.

steps.action: Move the TDC over the target using the TDC controls.
steps.voiced: Slew the TDC over the target.

steps.action: Interrogate target by using the Sensor Control Switch DEPRESS control for less than 1 second, then Sensor Control Switch RIGHT.
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch DEPRESS under 1 second, then Sensor Control Switch RIGHT to interrogate.
